free_text: -The level density of the deformed rare-earth nuclei-
Deuterium gas target, 2.5 cm long at 1 atm.
.All samples are of natural isotopic abundance, with
purity greater than 99 percent, and are placed
perpendicular to the scattering plane at 10 cm from
the gas cell and at zero degrees to the deuterium
Time of flight, flight path 155 cm from
variations. Cross sections corrected for flux
attenuation and multiple scattering using tables
.Corrections were made to the inelastic spectra
for attenuation of incident flux, and for enhancement
of the inelastic spectrum by elastic-inelastic events
Date is corrected. Other corrections made
.Metal, natural abundance, solid cylinder 5 cm high
